description_long: This pair of earrings features a playful cluster of spherical beads in various colors and patterns, including marbled purples, deep blues, and white beads with red floral motifs. Each earring is suspended from a gold-toned hook and includes a prominent cylindrical bead in a rich burgundy hue, adding vertical emphasis to the design. The beads are attached to a central gold ring, creating a dangling, mobile effect. The surfaces of the beads are glossy and smooth, reflecting light and enhancing their vibrant appearance. The overall construction is delicate yet visually striking, with a harmonious blend of colors and textures. The earrings exude a bohemian and eclectic style, suitable for adding a pop of color to urban streetwear.
description: A pair of gold-toned hook earrings with clustered, glossy multicolored beads and a prominent burgundy cylindrical bead, featuring floral and marbled motifs. The design is vibrant, eclectic, and visually dynamic.
description_view_0: Front view showing both earrings with all beads and cylindrical elements clearly visible, highlighting the color variety and arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and layering of the beads, with the cylindrical bead and largest round bead most prominent.
description_view_2: Alternate front view similar to view 0, showing the symmetrical arrangement and bead details from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the alignment of beads and the cylindrical element, with the largest bead in the foreground.
